description: Rudy, founder and CEO of Ztx, discusses the motivations behind pursuing a Web3 venture, emphasizing the desire for alternate realities and self-expression through avatars. He highlights Zepeto, a leading Metaverse platform, which allows users to create and monetize virtual items, fostering a global community of creators. The platform has attracted over 300 million users and facilitates significant economic opportunities for individuals, particularly in underdeveloped regions.
topic_summary: Rudy explores the intersection of identity, creativity, and economic opportunity in the Metaverse, using Zepeto as a case study for how virtual environments can empower individuals to pursue their passions and generate income, while also addressing the broader implications of Web3 technologies.
